'''dafasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oekaki|oekaki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oekaki|oekaki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dafasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæfæsæth|dæfæsæth]] || [[word:dæfæsæj|dæfæsæj]] || [[word:dæfæsæsh|dæfæsæsh]] || [[word:dæfæsæ|dæfæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafafasath|dafafasath]] || [[word:dafafasaj|dafafasaj]] || [[word:dafafasash|dafafasash]] || [[word:dafafasa|dafafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafasath|dafasath]] || [[word:dafasaj|dafasaj]] || [[word:dafasash|dafasash]] || [[word:dafasa|dafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafafsath|dafafsath]] || [[word:dafafsaj|dafafsaj]] || [[word:dafafsash|dafafsash]] || [[word:dafafsaf|dafafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dafasatha|dafasatha]] || [[word:dafasaja|dafasaja]] || [[word:dafasasha|dafasasha]] || [[word:dafasaka|dafasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dafasath|dafasath]] || [[word:dafasaj|dafasaj]] || [[word:dafasash|dafasash]] || [[word:dafasa|dafasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dafasathal|dafasathal]] || [[word:dafasajal|dafasajal]] || [[word:dafasashal|dafasashal]] || [[word:dafasakal|dafasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dafasathatha|dafasathatha]] || [[word:dafasajaja|dafasajaja]] || [[word:dafasashasha|dafasashasha]] || [[word:dafasaka|dafasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dafasathan|dafasathan]] || [[word:dafasajan|dafasajan]] || [[word:dafasashan|dafasashan]] || [[word:dafasakan|dafasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dafasathaoro|dafasathaoro]] || [[word:dafasajaoro|dafasajaoro]] || [[word:dafasashaoro|dafasashaoro]] || [[word:dafasakaoro|dafasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
